SPACEMERCS-AUTO_RESPONSIVE_CUIRASS.descr: The first time each combat you apply a debuff and gain a buff in a single turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SPACEMERCS-AUTO_RESPONSIVE_CUIRASS.title: Auto-Responsive Cuirass
SPACEMERCS-OF_THE_VOID.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], heal [blue]1[/blue] hp and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hunger[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-OF_THE_VOID.title: Of The Void
